text_modules.name: cnr - I could not reach you...
text_modules.content: I could not reach you by phone. Could you please send me a short email and let me know when you will be available again?

text_modules.name: ai - Analyse issue
text_modules.content:
Thank you for your request.

We will analyse the issue and get back to you as soon as possible.

text_modules.name: tya - Thank you in advance
text_modules.content: Kind regards and thank you in advance,

text_modules.content: If you need any additional assistance, please contact me
